transcript: How's everybody doing? I don't have time for that, right? Okay. Uh, hi, my name is Ryot, I'm from Xitadel. Today I'm gonna talk about how onchain debt financing is gonna change everything in the DeFi. So, Web3 projects can't access the debt financing. This is not a joke. So the in terms of like TradFi world, what if you need money as a founder, you go to the bank and then ask for money for uh with uh equity or whatever things that you in uh you have, uh you try to do the debt financing. That is most uh capital efficient way to raise fund instead of uh beside of asking your mama to give you money. But, selling equity is the only option that you have in OT uh in a Web3 market and that is creating a lot of different problems. Selling equity comes with a discount. You discount 50%. And then you have a selling pressure right off and then some of those buyers are gonna short your token because they want to create a delta neutral position. Obviously good for them, not good for you. So, we created this overcollateralized fixed yield debt financing protocol. Simply say, you put your idle token as a collateral, you uh we let you borrow money against to it. Let's say Jupiter try to borrow 100 million dollars, you they can put like 300 million dollars as a collateral and then they can borrow money and then they can have a liquid USDC in their pocket. It is tradable. So uh you can consider this as like a corporate bond model. So let's say it starts from one dollar, it will ends up in 1.13 dollar if uh if interest is 13%. And then you'll be able to redeem it at the maturity. We believe that this is just a start. The Web3 projects is just a tiny little fraction of the institutions or or any entities that has bunch of tokens in idle doing nothing for some reason. VC, DAO, DAT. And also not needless to say, RWAs. What are you gonna do uh to tokenize your building? Nothing. So tokenize your building, borrow money against to it. If you're in Nigeria have a building, you can borrow money in London. That's what we are trying to do. Uh this is a BrickUSD but I don't have time for that. Don't have time for that. Don't have time for that. So, our devnet is already up and our team is here. We had a pretty good builders round, but that is pretty much it, I think that is the only time that I have. But yeah, uh our devnet is already up. Uh please uh type the uh BPSOL and then if you have any question, hit me up. Thank you very much.

enrichment.generated_query: BrickUSD Xitadel Solana Breakpoint 2025 blog docs announcement

sources.title: Sui Unveils USDsui, a Native Stablecoin for the Sui Ecosystem, Issued by Bridge, a Stripe Company
sources.snippet:
Sui Unveils USDsui, a Native Stablecoin for the Sui Ecosystem, Issued by Bridge, a Stripe Company
[![The Sui Blog](https://blog.sui.io/content/images/2023/04/SuiFoundation_Logo_DarkBlue-1.png)](https://blog.sui.io)
[Announcements](https://blog.sui.io/tag/announcement/)
# Sui Unveils USDsui, a Native Stablecoin for the Sui Ecosystem, Issued by Bridge, a Stripe Company
USDsui, launching this year, brings a fully interoperable stablecoin designed to serve as a powerful, GENIUS-ready, multi-purpose digital dollar across Sui
* [![Sui Foundation](https://blog.sui.io/content/images/size/w100/2023/04/Sui_Droplet_Logo_Blue-3.png)](https://blog.sui.io/author/sui-foundation/)
#### [Sui Foundation](https://blog.sui.io/author/sui-foundation/)
12 Nov 2025•3 min read
![Sui Unveils USDsui, a Native Stablecoin for the Sui Ecosystem, Issued by Bridge, a Stripe Company](https://blog.sui.io/content/images/size/w2000/2025/11/Blog_Sui-Unveils-USDsui.png)
Sui is launching USDsui, a native stablecoin built using Bridge’s Open Issuance platform. This new infrastructure will power the next phase of growth as Sui scales into one of the world’s most active onchain economies.
USDsui is designed to serve as a foundational stablecoin for the Sui network. It offers builders a fully integrated, compliant-ready solution that is interoperable across Bridge’s ecosystem and optimized for Sui’s high-performance architecture.
At launch, it will be accessible across wallets, DeFi protocols, and applications built on Sui. USDsui will also be interoperable with other stablecoins powered by Bridge from major platforms such as Phantom, Hyperliquid, and MetaMask.
## Built by Trusted Partners for Sui Developers and End Users
Bridge’s Open Issuance platform allows USDsui to launch as a custom stablecoin built with enterprise-grade infrastructure from day one. Bridge’s approach gives USDsui a useful combination of onchain liquidity and sustainability, real-world payment utility for users, and the ability to perform seamless cross-border payments, remittances, and peer-to-peer transfers.
USDsui is also a developer-friendly, turnkey stablecoin solution for any team building on Sui, including projects building on Sui’s native liquidity layer,[Deepbook](https://deepbook.tech/?ref=blog.sui.io), to robust in-game economies like the ones found in the forthcoming EVE Frontier.
“This landmark product launch on Bridge connects Sui’s native assets directly to global commerce, fintech, and traditional financial rails, establishing Sui as the driver of the next phase of onchain economic activity. We are building a self-sustaining, utility-driven ecosystem where stablecoin economics fuels real-world adoption,” said Adeniyi Abiodun, Co-Founder and Chief Product Officer at[Mysten Labs](https://www.mystenlabs.com/?ref=blog.sui.io), the original contributor to Sui.
“USDsui adds another crucial piece of infrastructure that fully leverages the performance and scalability of the Sui Network, augments its existing native stablecoin offerings and gives developers and users a trusted digital dollar that leverages Sui’s unparalleled performance.”
The asset is intended to comply with the GENIUS Act when it takes effect. Further, any revenues that flow to Sui will be reinvested directly into the ecosystem in the form of growth and investment programs.
“Open Issuance eliminates the usual complexity and extended timelines associated with stablecoin deployment,” said Zach Abrams, co-founder and CEO of Bridge. “It’s designed exactly to enable platforms like Sui to launch their own stablecoins quickly and efficiently, and we’re excited to see what developers will build on top of USDsui.”
## A Network Ready for a Stablecoin Explosion
Sui is already one of the most active blockchain networks for stablecoin usage. Between August and September 2025 alone, the network processed a combined $412 billion in stablecoin transfer volume, a clear signal of both demand and readiness for a dedicated native solutio

tags.impact_reason: On-chain debt financing has potential, but it is still early and the project needs to gain traction.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic, high-tech vault as the Semantic Anchor because it directly represents the core function of the Xitadel protocol: securing vast amounts of 'idle tokens' as collateral. The 'corporate bond' is visualized as a physical, crystalline key or data slab that unlocks the vault, transforming dormant assets into liquid capital. This metaphor of unlocking a secure treasury clearly narrates the story of bringing traditional debt financing to Web3. I included the diegetic text 'FIXED YIELD' etched and glowing on the bond itself to highlight the protocol's key value proposition—a stable, predictable alternative to dilutive equity sales.
visual_idea.description: A tight, macro shot focusing on the point of contact where the crystalline bond-slab meets the vault's lock. The focus is on the intricate, glowing circuitry etched into the translucent slab and the precision-milled brushed titanium of the lock mechanism. Light refracts through the crystal, creating beautiful caustics and lens flares against the metallic surface. The background is a soft, bokeh-filled blur of glowing tokens from within the vault.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A tight, macro shot, perfectly centered and symmetrical, focusing intensely on the intricate point of contact where a crystalline bond-slab precisely meets a vault's lock mechanism. The translucent crystalline bond-slab is etched with complex, glowing circuitry that emits a soft, internal luminescence. Light dramatically refracts through the crystal, generating breathtaking caustics and elegant lens flares that dance across the adjacent surfaces. The lock mechanism is crafted from precision-milled brushed titanium, exhibiting a fine, subtle texture and reflecting the warm, amber glow of the crystal. Volumetric lighting emphasizes the depth and atmosphere, creating a cinematic contrast with deep blacks and warm highlights. The background dissolves into a soft, ethereal bokeh, revealing a blurred cascade of glowing tokens from within the vault. The entire frame is filled with rich, hyper-detailed textures. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering (PBR), Unreal Engine 5, cinematic contrast, global illumination, photorealistic, 1:1 aspect ratio.

editorial.headline: Xitadel Brings Corporate Bond Market to Solana with Backing from Yakovenko
editorial.standfirst: Web3 treasuries are sitting on billions in idle tokens but lack liquidity. Xitadel's new debt protocol offers a 'corporate bond' alternative to the dilutive equity dumps that plague DeFi founders.
key_takeaways: Strategic Backing: Investment from Solana co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko, Bonk's Nom, and Jupiter advisor Kash Dhanda.
Product: Liquid Treasury Tokens (LTTs) enable projects to borrow USDC against governance tokens without selling.
Status: Devnet is live now; Xitadel is part of the exclusive Solana Incubator cohort.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
For years, Web3 founders have faced a brutal 'equity trap.' When a protocol needs runway, the standard playbook is to sell native tokens via OTC deals or open market sales. As Xitadel co-founder **Ryot Seo** bluntly explained at Breakpoint, this is catastrophic for cap tables: founders often suffer a 50% discount on these sales, immediately triggering selling pressure and inviting predatory short sellers looking to delta-hedge their positions.

**Xitadel** is engineering the exit from this trap by introducing an onchain corporate bond market. Their flagship instrument, the **Liquid Treasury Token (LTT)**, allows protocols to collateralize their idle governance tokens (e.g., JUP, BONK) to borrow liquid USDC. Unlike a simple lending protocol, these are structured as fixed-yield debt instruments—tradable bonds that mature at a premium (e.g., redeeming at $1.13 on the dollar). This allows treasuries to access immediate liquidity while retaining their governance power and avoiding the price-crashing dynamics of a token sell-off.

The ambition extends beyond crypto-native treasuries into Real World Assets (RWAs) with a product hinted at as **BrickUSD**. Seo outlined a vision where physical assets, such as real estate in Nigeria, could be tokenized to access global liquidity markets in London. By bridging the gap between idle assets and active capital, Xitadel is positioning itself as the foundational 'Bond Layer' for the Solana ecosystem—a critical piece of infrastructure validated by its acceptance into the Solana Incubator and backing from the network's heaviest hitters.
